espresso: OpenAI released new coding improvements for AI agents. Several developer tools now integrate autonomous workflows. Engineering teams are rapidly adopting AI-first pipelines.
coldbrew: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is becoming a standard for connecting AI systems with external tools. It allows agents to safely interact with APIs, databases, and applications. Engineers should understand MCP because it enables production-ready AI workflows.
pastry: OpenLovable is a modern open-source UI builder inspired by AI-native development. It focuses on fast prototyping with beautiful components and excellent developer experience.
